ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions planned for the experiment */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants planned for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* General health status of the participant */,
  "participation_history" TEXT /* Previous experiments the participant has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the trial belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant in the trial */,
  "context_role" TEXT /* Role of the context in the trial */,
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the cue presented in the trial */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the context presented in the trial */,
  "is_sick" INTEGER /* Whether the participant is sick */,
  "correct_button" INTEGER /* The correct button to press in the trial */,
  "is_test" INTEGER /* Whether the trial is a test trial */,
  "choice_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the choice made by the participant */,
  "isi_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inter-stimulus interval */,
  "feedback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the feedback given to the participant */,
  "iti_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the inter-trial interval */,
  "stim_onset" INTEGER /* Time at which the stimulus is presented */,
  "stim_offset" INTEGER /* Time at which the stimulus is removed */,
  "iti_offset" INTEGER /* Time at which the inter-trial interval ends */,
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the food stimulus */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant stimulus */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session in which the trial was conducted */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the trial within the session */,
  "trial_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "trial_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_cue_id FOREIGN KEY ("cue_id") REFERENCES cues ("cue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_food_id FOREIGN KEY ("food_id") REFERENCES foods ("food_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cues" (
  "cue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cue */,
  "cue_description" TEXT /* Description of the cue */,
  "cue_type" TEXT /* Type of cue */,
  "cue_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the cue presentation */,
  "cue_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the cue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_description" TEXT /* Description of the context */,
  "context_type" TEXT /* Type of context */,
  "context_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the context presentation */,
  "context_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foods" (
  "food_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each food */,
  "food_name" TEXT /* Name of the food */,
  "food_image" TEXT /* Image file of the food */,
  "food_type" TEXT /* Type of food */,
  "food_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the food */,
  "food_calories" INTEGER /* Caloric content of the food */,
  "food_image_path" TEXT /* Full path to the food image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("food_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "restaurant_name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_type" TEXT /* Type of restaurant */,
  "restaurant_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_image_path" TEXT /* Full path to the restaurant image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial result */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "participant_response" INTEGER /* Response made by the participant */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken by the participant to respond */,
  "trial_result_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the trial result */,
  "result_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the participant's response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "feedback_message" TEXT /* Message given to the participant as feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback */,
  "feedback_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the feedback presentation */,
  "feedback_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_feedbacks_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment conducted in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_participants" (
  "session_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-participant mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "session_participant_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the participant's performance in the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_participants_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES experiment_sessions ("session_id")
)
